Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class EditFieldType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.EditFieldType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class EditFieldType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for EditFieldType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="EditFieldType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="font" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}fontType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pos" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}posType"/>
         <element name="align" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}alignType"/>
         <element name="fName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="Limit" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}limitType"/>
         <element name="bEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="resStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="resFieldCnt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="wxCombo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="wyCombo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="xCombo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="bPersistent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="conditionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="isVar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="persistVar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="allowInactiveLookup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="useCalendar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="restrictCursor" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="listVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="mandatory" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}overrideKindType"/>
         <element name="autoComplete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="saveLayout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="varDataType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="enableMaximize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedByte"/>
         <element name="hideButtons" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="colorOk" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="colorError" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="tooltip" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="multivalue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="dbFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="useHistory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="maskPassword" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="clearOnNewSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="fieldLength" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="fieldDescription" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fieldDDC" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="script" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}ScriptType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupDDC" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupFieldType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="lookupFieldDbName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupStrict" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isLookup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="inputMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="multiValueSeparator" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="columns" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}columnType" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupConditionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupConditionFieldType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="lookupConditionFieldDbName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lookupCondition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="useQueryFormForLookup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="queryFormForLookup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="multiSelect" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="formatString" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="currencySymbol" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fractionDigits" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getColumns

      public List<ColumnType> getColumns()
      Gets the value of the columns property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the columns property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

          getColumns().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ColumnType

    • getLookupConditionField
